name: TrafficPoppy
description: Privacy-first web analytics that run entirely in your own AWS — a 1 KB script tag, no cookies, no banners, and nobody in the data path but you.

permissionSet.name: TrafficPoppy backend
permissionSet.description: Deploys and removes its own CloudFormation stack (named TrafficPoppyStack) holding the analytics table it creates. Every change and delete is limited to resources named TrafficPoppy* — it cannot touch anything else in your account. No IAM, no account or organisation access.
